changelog:
v1.4.0 - Architecture Overhaul & Code Quality

- Chat screen refactored: dialogs extracted to standalone files (image_gen_dialog, doc_gen_dialog), voice logic extracted to VoiceMixin, pure utility functions extracted to chat_utils.dart, PendingAttachmentBar extracted as reusable widget
- 325 lines removed from chat_screen.dart (1441 → 1116)
- Duplicate MockAIEngine removed from programmer_screen.dart, now uses canonical mock_engine.dart
- Transitive dependencies (markdown, highlight, package_info_plus) added explicitly to fix lint warnings
- Fixed use_build_context_synchronously warnings in settings screens
- Replaced @visibleForTesting lint suppressions with public currentState getter on ModelManager
- Syntax highlighting in Programmer code editor with VS Code-inspired theme
- Programmer projects persist via Hive (auto-save with 1-second debounce)
- Code block rendering with syntax highlighting and copy button in chat
- Streaming cancel button in General Chat
- Chat export to clipboard
- API key editing and data wipe in Settings
- Empty catch blocks replaced with debugPrint logging (48 blocks across 20+ files)
- Accessibility tooltips added to 15 IconButtons
- 0 analyze issues, 295 tests passing
